name: NextDecade Corp
business: NextDecade Corporation is a Houston-based energy company constructing and developing the Rio Grande LNG Facility, a natural gas liquefaction and export facility in Brownsville, Texas. It sells liquefied natural gas (LNG) under long-term sale and purchase agreements (SPAs) with 14 creditworthy counterparties. The company is also exploring a potential carbon capture and storage (CCS) project at the facility.

exposures.sentence: We are constructing and developing a natural gas liquefaction and export facility located in the Rio Grande Valley near Brownsville, Texas (the Rio Grande LNG Facility).
We are also developing and advancing the permitting process for expansion Trains 6 through 8 and exploring a potential carbon capture and storage ("CCS") project at the Rio Grande LNG Facility.

catalysts.event: Positive final investment decision (FID) and project financing for Train 4
catalysts.sentence: On September 9, 2025, we announced a positive FID on Train 4 and related infrastructure at the Rio Grande LNG Facility and issued full notice to proceed ("NTP") to Bechtel under the EPC contract for Train 4.

catalysts.event: Positive final investment decision (FID) and project financing for Train 5
catalysts.sentence: On October 16, 2025, we announced a positive FID on Train 5 and related infrastructure at the Rio Grande LNG Facility and issued full NTP to Bechtel under the EPC contract for Train 5.

catalysts.event: Initiation of pre-filing process with FERC for Train 6 expansion
catalysts.sentence: In November 2025, we initiated the pre-filing process with FERC for expansion at the Rio Grande LNG Facility that includes Train 6 and an additional marine berth, and we expect to file a full application for this expansion with FERC in mid-2026.

catalysts.event: Expected first LNG production from Train 1
catalysts.sentence: In March 2026, we announced that we expect to begin commissioning activities at the Rio Grande LNG Facility in 2026, and we expect first LNG production from Train 1 in the first half of 2027.

catalysts.event: 20-year LNG SPA with subsidiary of Saudi Aramco for 1.2 MTPA
catalysts.sentence: In April 2025, we announced a 20-year LNG Sale and Purchase Agreement ( SPA ) with a subsidiary of Saudi Aramco ( Aramco ), pursuant to which the Aramco subsidiary will purchase 1.2 MTPA of LNG from Train 4 at the Rio Grande LNG Facility for 20 years, on a free on board ( FOB ) basis at a price indexed to Henry Hub.
